zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella FitzBaldric於大約1080年出生在英國越可爾斯吉維茲時，她的父親Hugh FitzBaldric37歲，母親Emma Lascelles31歲。她於1092年與Guy de Craon I在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福萊斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1112年在英國林可爾史爾伯頓享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella FitzBaldric was born about 1080, in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, her father, Hugh FitzBaldric, was 37 and her mother, Emma Lascelles, was 31. She married Guy de Craon I in 1092, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1112, in Burton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella FitzBaldric est née environ 1080, à Skipwith, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh FitzBaldric, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Emma Lascelles, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Craon I en 1092, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1112, à Burton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ko.Cottingham, Yorkshire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella FitzBaldric(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 요르크실르 스키p위스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh FitzBaldric(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Lascelles(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1092년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 Guy de Craon I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1112년 영국 링코실르 버턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella FitzBaldric родилась около 1080 г. в местности скипвит, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh FitzBaldric было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Lascelles, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Craon I в 1092 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1112 г. в местности буртон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.
